structural_claim: Classical behavior emerges from quantum systems through environmental interaction and information dispersal rather than fundamental collapse

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Environmental entanglement dynamically selects preferred pointer states through information dispersal
Classical objectivity emerges through redundant encoding of selected information in the environment
Low-energy effective physics emerges from high-energy theory through systematic integration of short-distance degrees of freedom
Classical-like low-energy behavior emerges from quantum field theory by integrating out high-energy quantum fluctuations
